prompt: A professional conceptual illustration for a semiconductor AI automation system. Show a glowing brain/neural network on the left labeled 'AI Agent' connected to a chip blueprint/schematic on the right labeled 'RTL Output'. In the center, show a knowledge graph (nodes and edges representing signal causality) and a vector database cylinder (RAG). Above the flow, show input documents: spec sheet and algorithm code. Below show a verification shield with checkmark. Style: dark navy blue background, gold and cyan neon glow effects, clean geometric lines, technical but visually striking, suitable for executive presentation slide. No text clutter, icons and simple labels only.
